title: Netflix Releases Steel Ball Run (Fans Are Not Okay)
statement: Netflix has acquired Steel Ball Run but is dropping episodes with no weekly schedule. Fans have had enough. In protest, they began flooding the comment section with King Von x Johnny Joestar photoshop edits, each edit assigned a "von level" based on how hard Johnny was going in that episode.
The edits are lined up in a row. Moderators can remove any contiguous group of edits in one second, but ONLY if the von levels form a palindrome. After removal, the remaining edits close the gap.
What is the minimum number of seconds for the mods to nuke every single King Von Johnny Joestar edit from the comment section?
input_format: The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 10<sup>4</sup>), the number of test cases.
Each test case begins with a single integer n. The next line contains n integers c<sub>1</sub>, c<sub>2</sub>, ..., c<sub>n</sub> (1 ≤ c<sub>i</sub> ≤ n), the von levels.
output_format: For each test case, print a single integer: the minimum number of seconds to remove all edits.
constraints: Sum of n across all test cases ≤ 2×10<sup>4</sup>
